agb.intro: These Terms and Conditions govern the business relationship between Gesino Reisen and our customers. Please read them carefully.

keyPoints.title: Transparent Terms
keyPoints.text: Clear and understandable rules for all services.

keyPoints.title: Fair Conditions
keyPoints.text: Balanced rights and obligations for both parties.

keyPoints.title: Legal Compliance
keyPoints.text: All regulations comply with legal requirements.

sections.title: 1. Scope of Application
sections.content: These General Terms and Conditions apply to all business relationships between GeSino GmbH (hereinafter "Gesino Reisen") and our customers. The version valid at the time of contract conclusion shall apply in each case.

sections.title: 2. Contract Formation
sections.content: The contract is formed when Gesino Reisen accepts the customer's booking. Acceptance is confirmed by a booking confirmation via email. A mere confirmation of receipt of the booking request does not yet constitute acceptance.

subsections.title: 3.1 Scope of Services
subsections.content: The scope of the contractual services is determined by the service description in the offer and the details in the booking confirmation.

subsections.title: 3.2 Service Changes
subsections.content: Changes or deviations from individual travel services agreed in the contract that become necessary after conclusion of the contract are only permitted if they are not significant and do not affect the overall structure of the booked trip.

subsections.title: 4.1 Prices
subsections.content: The stated prices are final prices and include the applicable VAT.

subsections.title: 4.2 Payment Terms
subsections.content: A deposit of 20% of the travel price is due upon conclusion of the contract. The remaining balance is due 30 days before the start of travel.

sections.title: 5. Cancellation and Withdrawal
sections.content: The customer may withdraw from the trip at any time before the start of travel. The withdrawal must be declared to Gesino Reisen. The date of receipt of the withdrawal declaration is decisive. In the event of withdrawal, Gesino Reisen may claim appropriate compensation.

sections.title: 6. Liability
sections.content: Gesino Reisen is liable for the conscientious preparation of the trip, the careful selection and monitoring of service providers, and the proper provision of the contractually agreed travel services.

agb.contactTitle: Do you have questions about our Terms & Conditions?
agb.contactText: Our customer service team is available for any questions. Feel free to contact us for clarifications or specific questions.

datenschutz.intro: The protection of your personal data is important to us. Here you can find out how we handle your data.

keyPoints.title: Secure Protection
keyPoints.text: Your data is protected to the highest security standards.

keyPoints.title: Transparency
keyPoints.text: Full control over your personal data.

keyPoints.title: GDPR Compliant
keyPoints.text: Complies with all data protection guidelines.

sections.title: Privacy Policy
sections.content: This privacy policy informs you about the nature, scope and purpose of the processing of personal data within our online offering. With regard to the terms used, such as "processing" or "controller", we refer to the definitions in Art. 4 of the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR).

sections.title: Controller
sections.content:
GeSino GmbH
Mart-Stam-Str. 59
60438 Frankfurt am Main
Germany

Email: privacy@gesino-reisen.com

sections.title: Types of Processed Data
list: Content data (e.g. text entries, photographs, videos)
Usage data (e.g. visited websites, interest in content)
Meta/communication data (e.g. device information, IP addresses)

sections.title: Purpose of Processing
list: Provision of the online offering, its functions and content
Responding to contact requests and communication with users

sections.title: Cookies
sections.content: We use cookies to make our offering more user-friendly, effective and secure. Cookies are small text files stored on your computer by your browser. Most of the cookies we use are so-called "session cookies". They are automatically deleted after your visit ends.

sections.title: Your Rights
list: Right to information about the personal data concerning you

datenschutz.contactText: Our data protection officer is available for all your questions.

buchungsprozess.intro: Find out how easy it is to book your next trip with Gesino Reisen. Follow our clear booking process in just a few steps.

steps.title: Choose your destination
steps.description: Select from our diverse range of travel destinations worldwide.

steps.title: Check availability
steps.description: Enter your desired travel dates and check availability.

steps.title: Personal details
steps.description: Fill in the booking form with your personal information.

steps.title: Payment
steps.description: Choose your preferred payment method and complete the booking.

steps.title: Confirmation
steps.description: Receive your booking confirmation by email with all important details.

buchungsprozess.contactTitle: Do you have questions about the booking process?
buchungsprozess.contactText: Our customer service team is available for you at any time.

zahlungsmethoden.intro: We offer you various secure payment options for your booking. Choose the method that suits you best.

methods.title: Bank Transfer
methods.description: Direct transfer to our bank account

methods.title: PayPal
methods.description: Pay quickly and securely with PayPal

zahlungsmethoden.securityText: All payments are processed via secure SSL-encrypted connections. Your data is safe with us.

reiseversicherung.intro: Protect your trip optimally. With our insurance packages you travel worry-free and are well protected.

benefits.title: Comprehensive Protection
benefits.description: Worldwide coverage for all types of travel

benefits.title: 24/7 Emergency Service
benefits.description: Available around the clock for you

faqItems.question: When should I take out travel insurance?
faqItems.answer: Ideally right when you book your trip, as the insurance coverage starts immediately and you are protected in case of cancellations.

faqItems.question: Which types of travel are covered?
faqItems.answer: Our insurance covers all types of travel: package tours, individual trips, business travel and more.

faqItems.question: Where does the insurance coverage apply?
faqItems.answer: The insurance coverage applies worldwide in all countries, except for areas with travel warnings.

faqItems.question: What about COVID-19 illness?
faqItems.answer: Our Premium and Business packages include comprehensive COVID-19 protection for cancellations and medical care.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Find quick answers to your questions. If you need further assistance, please don't hesitate to contact us.
faq.noAnswerText: Our customer service team is available for further questions.

questions.q: How can I book a trip?
questions.a: You can easily book your trip online through our website. Choose your desired destination, check availability and follow the booking process.
Yes, bookings can be cancelled subject to our cancellation policy. The exact terms can be found in your booking documents.
We accept credit cards (Visa, Mastercard, American Express), PayPal and bank transfer.

questions.q: When do I have to pay for the trip?
questions.a: A deposit of 20% of the travel price is due at the time of booking. The remaining balance must be paid no later than 30 days before departure.

questions.q: What is included in the travel price?
questions.a: The exact scope of services varies depending on the offer and is listed in the respective trip description. Generally, accommodation and listed activities are included.
We recommend taking out travel insurance. This can optionally be added during the booking process.

flugbuchung.intro: Find the best flight connections to your destination. We offer a wide selection of flights from renowned airlines.

benefits.title: Large Selection
benefits.text: Flights from all major airlines at the best prices.

benefits.title: Flexible Booking
benefits.text: Free rebooking and cancellation with many fares.

hotelbuchung.intro: Find your perfect hotel for an unforgettable stay. We offer a wide selection of hand-picked hotels for every taste.

benefits.title: Best Selection
benefits.text: Hand-picked hotels for the highest quality and comfort.

benefits.title: Personal Service
benefits.text: Individual advice and support with your booking.

benefits.title: Top Locations
benefits.text: Hotels in the best locations for your perfect stay.

reisepakete.intro: Discover our carefully curated travel packages for unforgettable experiences. Each package has been curated by our experts.

bewertungen.intro: Find out what our customers say about their trips with Gesino Reisen. Authentic reviews help you make your decision.
bewertungen.shareText: Have you traveled with Gesino Reisen? We look forward to your feedback!
